initial_program:
% ---------- 1. Grid dimensions ----------
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(0..N-1) :- n_rows(N).
col(0..M-1) :- n_cols(M).

% ---------- 2. Row statistics ----------
rowCount(R) :- #count{ C : input(R, C, Cl), Cl != 0 }.

% ---------- 3. Choose the three source rows ----------
maxCount(N) :- N = #max{ rowCount(R) : R }.
{ S0, S1, S2 : rowCount(S) = maxCount } 3.
constraint :- S0 != S1, S0 != S2, S1 != S2, S0 < S1, S1 < S2.

% No other row may have a larger count than S0
constraint :- R != S0, R != S1, R != S2 :-
    rowCount(R) <= rowCount(S0).

% No other row may have the same count as S0 but a smaller index
constraint :- R != S0, R != S1, R != S2 :-
    rowCount(R) = rowCount(S0),
    R < S0.

% No other row may have a larger count than S1 (among rows not S0)
constraint :- R != S0, R != S1, R != S2 :-
    rowCount(R) <= rowCount(S1).

% No other row may have the same count as S1 but a smaller index
constraint :- R != S0, R != S1, R != S2 :-
    rowCount(R) = rowCount(S1),
    R < S1.

% ---------- 4. Helper aggregates ----------
% leftmost column of a row
colLeft1(R,C) :- input(R,C,Cl), Cl != 0,
    #count{ C2 : input(R,C2,Cl2), Cl2 != 0, C2 < C } = 0.

% second leftmost column of a row
colLeft2(R,C) :- input(R,C,Cl), Cl != 0,
    #count{ C2 : input(R,C2,Cl2), Cl2 != 0, C2 < C, C2 > colLeft1(R,Col1) } = 0.

% rightmost column of a row
colRight1(R,C) :- input(R,C,Cl), Cl != 0,
    #count{ C2 : input(R,C2,Cl2), Cl2 != 0, C2 > C } = 0.

% second rightmost column of a row
colRight2(R,C) :- input(R,C,Cl), Cl != 0,
    #count{ C2 : input(R,C2,Cl2), Cl2 != 0, C > C2, C2 < colRight1(R,Col1) } = 0.

% third rightmost column of a row (when at least three nonzeros)
colRight3(R,C) :- input(R,C,Cl), Cl != 0,
    #count{ C2 : input(R,C2,Cl2), Cl2 != 0, C2 > C, C2 < colRight1(R,Col1), C2 < colRight2(R,Col2) } = 0.

% values of those columns
colLeft1Val(R,Cl) :- input(R,C,Cl), colLeft1(R,C).
colLeft2Val(R,Cl) :- input(R,C,Cl), colLeft2(R,C).
colRight1Val(R,Cl) :- input(R,C,Cl), colRight1(R,C).
colRight2Val(R,Cl) :- input(R,C,Cl), colRight2(R,C).
colRight3Val(R,Cl) :- input(R,C,Cl), colRight3(R,C).

% ---------- 5. Max later values ----------
maxLater(N) :- N = #max{ Cl : input(R, C, Cl), Cl != 0, R > S2 }.
hasLater := #count{ R : R > S2 } > 0.

maxLater1(N) :- N = #max{ Cl : input(R, C, Cl), Cl != 0, R > S1 }.
hasLater1 := #count{ R : R > S1 } > 0.

% ---------- 6. Output rows ----------
% Row 0 (even)
output(0,0,Cl0) :-
    rowCount(S0) >= 3,
    colRight3Val(S0,Cl0), colRight2Val(S0,Cl1), colRight1Val(S0,Cl2).

output(0,0,Cl0) :-
    rowCount(S0) = 2,
    colLeft1Val(S0,Cl0), colLeft2Val(S0,Cl1),
    1 { Cl2 : maxLater } 1 :- hasLater,
    1 { Cl2 : 0 } 1 :- not hasLater.

output(0,0,Cl0) :-
    rowCount(S0) = 1,
    colLeft1Val(S0,Cl0),
    1 { Cl1 : maxLater } 1 :- hasLater,
    1 { Cl1 : 0 } 1 :- not hasLater.

output(0,1,Cl1) :-
    rowCount(S0) >= 3,
    colRight2Val(S0,Cl1).

output(0,1,Cl1) :-
    rowCount(S0) = 2,
    colRight1Val(S0,Cl1).

output(0,1,Cl1) :-
    rowCount(S0) = 1,
    colRight1Val(S0,Cl1).

output(0,2,Cl2) :-
    rowCount(S0) >= 3,
    colRight1Val(S0,Cl2).

output(0,2,Cl2) :-
    rowCount(S0) = 2,
    1 { Cl2 : maxLater } 1 :- hasLater,
    1 { Cl2 : 0 } 1 :- not hasLater.

% Row 1 (odd)
output(1,0,0) :- true.   % column 0 is always 0
output(1,1,Cl1) :-
    rowCount(S1) >= 3,
    colRight2Val(S1,Cl1).

output(1,1,Cl1) :-
    rowCount(S1) = 2,
    colRight1Val(S1,Cl1).

output(1,1,Cl1) :-
    rowCount(S1) = 1,
    colRight1Val(S1,Cl1).

output(1,2,Cl2) :-
    rowCount(S1) >= 3,
    colRight1Val(S1,Cl2).

output(1,2,Cl2) :-
    rowCount(S1) = 2,
    1 { Cl2 : maxLater1 } 1 :- hasLater1,
    1 { Cl2 : 0 } 1 :- not hasLater1.

% Row 2 (even, last selected row)
output(2,0,Cl0) :-
    rowCount(S2) >= 3,
    colRight3Val(S2,Cl0), colRight2Val(S2,Cl1), colRight1Val(S2,Cl2).

output(2,0,Cl0) :-
    rowCount(S2) = 2,
    colRight2Val(S2,Cl0), colRight1Val(S2,Cl1).

output(2,0,Cl0) :-
    rowCount(S2) = 1,
    colRight1Val(S2,Cl0).

output(2,1,Cl1) :-
    rowCount(S2) >= 3,
    colRight2Val(S2,Cl1).

output(2,1,Cl1) :-
    rowCount(S2) = 2,
    colRight1Val(S2,Cl1).

output(2,2,Cl2) :- true.   % filler forced to 0 for the last selected row
